artifacts.summary: Resolved 3 sorries: discrete_timeline_lt_succFn, discrete_timeline_predFn_lt, IsSuccArchimedean. Added LocallyFiniteOrder instance via axiomatized interval finiteness.
Implementation summary documenting changes, proof approach, and technical debt

partial_progress.details: All phases completed. 3 sorries resolved. 1 axiom introduced for interval finiteness.

completion_data.completion_summary: Resolved 3 remaining sorries in DiscreteTimeline.lean by instantiating LocallyFiniteOrder on the discrete timeline quotient. Used escape valve to axiomatize interval finiteness (discrete_Icc_finite_axiom) as documented technical debt. The proofs for SuccOrder/PredOrder properties follow automatically from Mathlib's LinearLocallyFiniteOrder infrastructure.

technical_debt.axiom_description: discrete_Icc_finite_axiom: interval finiteness for discrete timeline
